<style>
    .separador-home {
        height: 80px;
        display: table;
        width: 100%;
        clear: both;
    }
    .separador-home p.heading {
        font-family: 'Portada-Light';
        vertical-align: middle;
        display: table-cell;
        font-size: 24px;
        color: #999;
        height: 80px;
        padding: 15px 0 0 4px;
        margin: 0;
        width: 65%;
        text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .separador-home p.heading span:before {
        content: "";
        width: 2px;
        height: 23px;
        margin: 0 10px;
        background-color: #999;
        display: inline-block;
    }
    .separador-home p.heading:before {
        content: "";
        background: url(https://www.mypress.mx/img/my-press-gris.svg) no-repeat;
        display: inline-block;
        width: 28px;
        height: 28px;
        vertical-align: sub;
    }
    div .mp-title-content-opinion {
        display: block;
        background: #f26522;
        padding: 2px 15px 3px 15px;
        margin: 0 0 2px;
        position: relative;
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 1.5em;
    }
    figcaption.copetedestacado2 {
        /* color: yellow; */
        padding: 160px 5px 5px;
        opacity: 1;
        top: unset;
    }
    figcaption.copetedestacado2 p {
        opacity: 1;
    }

    figcaption.copetedestacado2:hover p {
        color: white;
        opacity: 1;
        display: inline-block;
        background: rgba(7, 46, 78, 0.8);
    }

    figcaption.copetedestacado2 h6 {
        color: white;
        margin-top: 80px;
        padding-bottom: 40px 5px;
        opacity: 0;
        display: inline-block;
        background: rgba(7, 46, 78, 0.8);
    }

    figcaption.copetedestacado2:hover h6 {
        color: white;
        margin-top: 80px;
        padding: 10px 5px;
        opacity: 1;
        display: inline-block;
        background: rgba(7, 46, 78, 0.8);
    }

    figcaption h4, figure.titulo p {
        color: white;
        padding-bottom: 5px 5px;
    }
    figcaption h4:hover {
        background: rgba(7,46,78,0.8);
    }
    figcaption a {
        font-size: 1.50em;
        background: rgba(7,46,78,.3);
        color: white;
        text-decoration: none;
    }
    .h4, h4 {
        font-size: 18px;
    }
    figcaption.mp-home {
        position: absolute;
        height: 100%;
        width: 100%;
        top: 0;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        padding-bottom: 160px;
        color: white;
        -webkit-transition: all 0.4s ease-in;
        -webkit-transition: rotate(360deg);
    }

    @media (min-width:414px) and (max-width:2400px) {
        figcaption.copetedestacado {
            /* color: yellow; */
            padding: 160px 5px 5px;
            opacity: 1;
        }
    }
    @media screen and (max-width:413px) {
        figcaption.copetedestacado {
            /* color: yellow; */
            padding: 190px 5px;
            opacity: 1;
        }
    }


    div .mp-title-content-opinion {
        display: block;
        background: #ffffff;
        padding: 2px 15px 3px 15px;
        margin: 0 0 2px;
        position: relative;
        color: #000000;
        font-size: 1.5em;
    }

        <script>
            (function (i, s, o, g, r, a, m) {
                i['GoogleAnalyticsObject'] = r;
                i[r] = i[r] || function () {
                    (i[r].q = i[r].q || []).push(arguments)
                }, i[r].l = 1 * new Date();
                a = s.createElement(o),
                    m = s.getElementsByTagName(o)[0];
                a.async = 1;
                a.src = g;
                m.parentNode.insertBefore(a, m)
            })(window, document, 'script', 'https://www.google-analytics.com/analytics.js', 'ga');

            ga('create', 'UA-80385356-1', 'auto');
            ga('send', 'pageview');

        </script>
        <!-- Facebook Pixel 11 diciembre 2017 -->
        <script>
            !function (f, b, e, v, n, t, s) {
                if (f.fbq) return;
                n = f.fbq = function () {
                    n.callMethod ?
                        n.callMethod.apply(n, arguments) : n.queue.push(arguments)
                };
                if (!f._fbq) f._fbq = n;
                n.push = n;
                n.loaded = !0;
                n.version = '2.0';
                n.queue = [];
                t = b.createElement(e);
                t.async = !0;
                t.src = v;
                s = b.getElementsByTagName(e)[0];
                s.parentNode.insertBefore(t, s)
            }(window, document, 'script',
                'https://connect.facebook.net/en_US/fbevents.js');
            fbq('init', '439186006455830');
            fbq('track', 'PageView');
        </script>
        <noscript><img height="1" width="1" style="display:none"
                       src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=439186006455830&ev=PageView&noscript=1"
            /></noscript>
        <!-- End Facebook Pixel Code -->



        <!-- Global site tag (gtag.js) - Google Ads: 845711358 25/01/2019 -->
        <script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=AW-845711358"></script>
        <script>
            window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
            function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
            gtag('js', new Date());

            gtag('config', 'AW-845711358');
        </script>
